name: Unstable Wall of Frost
description:
Create an icy barrier, dealing 281 Frost Damage to enemies in the area every 1 second and applying Unstable Frost Shield for 6 seconds on you and nearby allies that absorbs up to 4267 damage from projectiles.

Chilled enemies are afflicted with Minor Breach and their Movement Speed is reduced by 40% for 4 seconds.

When the effect ends, the barrier explodes, dealing 1199 Frost Damage and shielding you and nearby allies for 2065 from projectiles.
